effects.text: Take 1 card from the deck or in reputation range.
Take 1 card from the deck or in reputation range.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} / {ConservationPoint-2} for 3 / 6 research icons.
Each time you play a research icon into your zoo, gain {Reputation-1} .
Gain {Money-2} / {Money-5} / {Money-10} if you have 1 / 2 / 3 universities.
Supporting a conservation project requires only {Slot-4} .
Gain {Money-2} for each research icon in your zoo.
Each time you play a research icon into your zoo, gain {ConservationPoint-1} .
Gain {Appeal-2} for each conservation project you have supported so far.
Income: Gain {ConservationPoint-1} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} each for 2 different continent and/or animal category icons. For each {ConservationPoint-1} that you gain this way, all other players gain {Money-2} .
Each time research icons are played into any zoo, gain {Money-2} for each such icon.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each research icon in your zoo.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for 5 different animal category icons.
Gain 1 {XToken} -token.
Income: Gain 1 {XToken} -token.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 3 universities.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each America icon in your zoo.
Each time you play an Americas icon into your zoo, you may build 1 kiosk for free.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 5 kiosks.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each Europe icon in your zoo.
Each time you play a Europe icon into your zoo, you may build a 1-space enclosure for free.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 5 occupied standard 1-space enclosures.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each Australia icon in your zoo.
Each time you play an Australia icon into your zoo, you may place 1 card from your hand under this card to gain {Appeal-2} (pouch 1).
Gain {Appeal-1} for each Asia icon in your zoo.
Each time you play an Asia icon into your zoo, you may build 1 pavilion for free.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each Africa icon in your zoo.
Each time you play an Africa icon into your zoo, you may place any action card on {Slot-1} .
Gain {Appeal-1} for each X-token you have.
When playing this card, place 2 player tokens on it. When supporting a **base** conservation project, you may discard exactly 1 token as any icon.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for 5 supports of conservation projects.
Hire 1 association worker. (Full-throated).
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 9 reputation.
Each time you build at least 1 building with a Build action {BuildActionCard} . you may build exactly 1 more of the same kind (except for special enclosures) at the normal cost.
Gain {Appeal-5} if your zoo map is completely covered.
When playing this card, place 2 player tokens on it. When supporting a **base** conservation project, you may discard exactly 1 token as any icon.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for 5 supports of conservation projects.
You may build over water and rock spaces. Ignore all requirements for water and rock spaces.
Gain {Money-2} for each water and rock requirement.
Gain {Appeal-2} for each pair of water and rock requirements, max. {Appeal-6}.
Gain {Money-3} .
Income: Gain {Money-3} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 9 reputation.
Each time you gain the placement bonus of a border space in your zoo, you additionally gain another free placement bonus.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if all border spaces in your zoo are covered.
Gain up to {ConservationPoint-3} total, {ConservationPoint-1} for each research icon. For each {ConservationPoint-1} that you gain this way, all other players gain {Money-2} .
Gain 1 {XToken} -token.
Each time you support a Release into the Wild conservation project, additionally gain {ConservationPoint-1} . You may support every Release into the Wild conservation project more than once.
Gain 1 {XToken} -token.
The effects of Venom, Constriction, Hypnosis, and Pilfering do not affect you.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for 5 different continent icons.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for 5 different continent icons.
Choose and mark on this card. Successively reveal cards from the deck and take the first card of the chosen kind.
You must not play the other kind any more. Each time you play a small or large animal, you gain {Appeal-2} or {Appeal-4} respectively.
Gain {Money-2} for each small animal in your zoo.

Each time you play only small animals in the Animals action {AnimalActionCard} , you may play 1 further small animal at the normal cost. After that, take 1 small animal from the display (if available).
Gain {Appeal-1} for each small animal in your zoo.
Your cost to play a small animal is reduced by {Money-3} .
Gain {Appeal-2} for each large animal in your zoo.
Your cost to play a large animal is reduced by {Money-4} .
Income: Gain {Money-3} / {Money-6} / {Money-9} for 1/3/5 primate icons in your zoo.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each primate icon in your zoo.
Income: Gain {Money-3} / {Money-6} / {Money-9} for 1/3/5 reptile icons in your zoo.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each reptile icon in your zoo.
Income: Gain {Money-3} / {Money-6} / {Money-9} for 1/3/5 bird icons in your zoo.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each bird icon in your zoo.
Income: Gain {Money-3} / {Money-6} / {Money-9} for 1/3/5 predator icons in your zoo.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each predator icon in your zoo.
Income: Gain {Money-3} / {Money-6} / {Money-9} for 1/3/5 herbivore icons in your zoo.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each herbivore icon in your zoo.
Each time a primate icon is played into **any** zoo, gain {Money-3} .
Each time a reptile icon is played into **any** zoo, gain {Money-3} .
Each time a bird icon is played into **any** zoo, gain {Money-3} .
Each time a predator icon is played into **any** zoo, gain {Money-3} .
Each time a herbivore icon is played into **any** zoo, gain {Money-3} .
For each space you cover that is next to a water space, gain {Money-1} .
Gain {Appeal-1} for each water icon in your zoo.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if all water spaces are connected.
For each space you cover that is next to a rock space, gain {Money-1} .
Gain {Appeal-3} for each pair of rock icons in your zoo.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if all rock spaces are connected.
Each time you play a herbivore icon into your zoo, gain {Appeal-2} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 6 herbivore icons.
Place next to at least 1 rock space.
Each time you play a bird icon into your zoo, gain {Appeal-2} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 6 bird icons.
Place next to at least 1 water space.
Each time you play a water icon into your zoo, gain {Appeal-2} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 6 water icons.
Place next to at least 2 water spaces.
Each time you play a rock icon into your zoo, gain {Appeal-2} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 6 rock icons.
Place next to at least 2 rock spaces.
Each time you play a primate icon into your zoo, gain {Appeal-2} .
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} if you have at least 6 primate icons.
Place next to at least 1 rock space.
Each time you play a primate icon into your zoo, gain 1 {XToken} -token.
Place this unique building in your zoo.
Each time you play a bird icon into your zoo, draw 2 cards from the deck. Keep 1 and discard the other (Perception 2).
Place this 3-space building in a straight line.
Each time you play a reptile icon into your zoo, you may sell up to 2 cards from your hand for {Money-4} each (Sunbathing 2).
Place next to at least 1 water space.
Each time a bear icon is played into any zoo, gain {Appeal-2} .
Place next to at least 1 water space.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} / {ConservationPoint-2} for 3 / 6 bear icons.
Each time you play a predator icon into your zoo, reveal the topmost X cards of the deck. Add 1 animal card to your hand. Discard the other cards. (X = number of your predator icons) .
Place next to at least 1 rock space.
Place 3 player tokens on this card. Each time you play a herbivore icon into your zoo, you may remove exactly 1 token and play 1 sponsors card from your hand by paying its level.
Place this 4-space building.
Place on at least 2 border spaces. Take 1 card from the deck or in reputation range.
Place next to at least 1 rock space.
Place next to at least 1 water space.
Place on 2 border spaces. Need not be adjacent to other buildings.
**Income:** Gain {Money-2} for each building, except empty standard enclosures, next to the side entrance.
Gain {Appeal-5} if zoo is completely covered.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each connected water space.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for each 2 unconnected water spaces.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each connected rock space.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for each 2 unconnected rock spaces.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each connected border space without buildings.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for each group of 6 spaces without buildings.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for 5 different animal category icons.
Each time you gain a continent or animal category icon that is not yet in your zoo, gain {Appeal-1} and {Money-2} .
{Money-2} for each different continent or animal category icon in your zoo.
If you play a large animal, you may ignore 1 condition of your choice.
You may place 1 5-space enclosure for free.
Gain {Appeal-1} for each connected space with a placement bonus.
Gain {ConservationPoint-1} for each 2 unconnected spaces with a placement bonus.
